name: @aliran/react-native
description: Aliran React Native binding — Bare worklet host + drop-in <AliranVideo> on react-native-video
comment: Ships TypeScript source — Metro consumes it directly (RN CLI's default sourceExts include ts/tsx). No native code of its own: react-native-bare-kit provides the worklet runtime and react-native-video the player. The host app supplies the worklet bundle (bare-pack output; see client/backend). Install alongside those peers; with react-native-tvos prereleases use --legacy-peer-deps.
